rationale: Acting on Review 2 removes four needless public @[simp] lemmas (includeRight_apply is pure rfl duplicating defeq with no effect on normal forms; map_tmul/map_toAlgHom/map_toCoalgHom are direct special cases of Mathlib's Bialgebra.TensorProduct.*_[simp] after unfolding the map def), yielding a strictly smaller/cleaner API surface; Review 1 leaves them in place, producing a larger and more duplicative public surface for the same functionality.
